topic: From Zero to Your First AI Agent in 25 Minutes (No Coding)

script.hook: What if I told you that you could build an AI agent that makes money while you sleep - without writing a single line of code?
main_content:
Introduction to AI Automation Opportunity (0:30-2:00):
- Current AI automation market size: $5.40 billion in 2024
- Projected growth to $50.31 billion by 2030
- Why NOW is the perfect time to enter this market

Step-by-Step AI Agent Creation (2:00-5:00):
- Selecting the right no-code platform
- Defining your AI agent's core purpose
- Configuring basic workflows
- Integrating communication channels
- Setting up automated responses

Monetization Strategies (5:00-7:00):
- 5 high-potential AI automation services
- Pricing models for your first AI agent
- Real-world implementation examples
- Common pitfalls to avoid

Case Study and Live Demo (7:00-8:30):
- Showcase a working WhatsApp appointment scheduling AI agent
- Demonstrate actual setup and interactions
script.cta: Join my FREE AI Automation Masterclass - Link in description! Limited spots available this week. Drop 'AUTOMATE' in comments to get instant access!
